revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:二上山]]
'''Futagami-yama''' (二上山, also read as Nijo-san or other variations) refers to several mountains and related locations in Japan.
== Mountain Names == * {{ill|Futagami-yama (Toyama Prefecture)|ja|二上山 (富山県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagami-yama (Toyama Prefecture)|1=Mount Futagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371270}} - A 274-meter mountain located on the border of {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|qid=Q502988|lt=Takaoka|1=Takaoka, Toyama}} and {{ill|Himi, Toyama|en|Himi, Toyama|qid=Q646886|lt=Himi|1=Himi, Toyama}}, Toyama Prefecture. Pronounced "Futagami-yama." * {{ill|Mount Nijō|en|Mount Nijō|qid=Q11371271|lt=Mount Nijō|1=Mount Nijō}} - A 517-meter mountain located on the border of {{ill|Katsuragi, Nara|en|Katsuragi, Nara|qid=Q659672|lt=Katsuragi, Nara|1=Katsuragi, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture, and {{ill|Taishi, Osaka|en|Taishi, Osaka|qid=Q1347173|lt=Taishi, Osaka|1=Taishi, Osaka}}, Osaka Prefecture. Pronounced "Nijo-san." * {{ill|Futagami-yama (Tottori Prefecture)|ja|二上山 (鳥取県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagami-yama (Tottori Prefecture)|1=Futagami-yama Shrine (Tottori Prefecture)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21654507}} - A 333-meter mountain in {{ill|Iwami, Tottori|en|Iwami, Tottori|qid=Q281925|lt=Iwami|1=Iwami, Tottori}}, Tottori Prefecture. Pronounced "Futagami-yama." * {{ill|Futakami-san (Okayama Prefecture)|ja|二上山 (岡山県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futakami-san (Okayama Prefecture)|1=Futakami Yama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17212846}} - A 689-meter mountain in {{ill|Misaki, Okayama|en|Misaki, Okayama|qid=Q1156100|lt=Misaki, Okayama|1=Misaki, Okayama}}, Okayama Prefecture. Pronounced "Futakami-san." * {{ill|Futagami-yama (Miyazaki Prefecture)|ja|二上山 (宮崎県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagami-yama (Miyazaki Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A 1,082-meter mountain located on the border of {{ill|Takachiho, Miyazaki|en|Takachiho, Miyazaki|qid=Q1350939|lt=Takachiho|1=Takachiho, Miyazaki}} and {{ill|Gokase, Miyazaki|en|Gokase, Miyazaki|qid=Q1206765|lt=Gokase|1=Gokase, Miyazaki}}, Miyazaki Prefecture. Pronounced "Futagami-yama."
== Other Uses == * {{ill|Nijōzan Station|en|Nijōzan Station|qid=Q11371274|lt=Nijo-zan Station|1=Nijōzan Station}} - A train station on the {{ill|Minami Osaka Line|en|Minami Osaka Line|qid=Q901342|lt=Kintetsu Minami Osaka Line|1=Minami Osaka Line}} in {{ill|Kashiba, Nara|en|Kashiba, Nara|qid=Q696643|lt=Kashiba|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture. Pronounced "Nijo-zan-eki." * {{ill|Futagami-yama Castle|ja|二上山城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagami-yama Castle|1=Futagamiyama Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11371272}} - A historical castle located in {{ill|Iwami, Tottori|en|Iwami, Tottori|qid=Q281925|lt=Iwami|1=Iwami, Tottori}}, Tottori Prefecture. Pronounced "Futagami-yama-jo."
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|二上山|version=93019144|comment=Imported full ja history}}
